pathAUserApproves: create Attack v2 exact-file approval record
set completeArcherMotionApproved=true only after Neutral+Idle+Move+Attack-v2 gates all true
authorize a separate CC runtime integration task
pathBUserRejects: preserve v2 immutable as rejected candidate
authorize next production method appropriate to the failure
prefer distinct articulated key-pose reconstruction or pose-guided regeneration when pose clarity fails
completeArcherRule: Neutral approved AND Idle approved AND Move approved AND Attack v2 exact-file approved
attackV1Rule: Attack v1 rejection does not block v2 approval, but Attack v1 must never be runtime-bound or used as fallback once v2 is approved.
